artifacts.summary: WezTerm Lua API research confirming LocalProcessInfo.ppid/cwd fields, procinfo.current_working_dir_for_pid(), SpawnCommandInNewTab cwd parameter, and action_callback usage with exact implementation code

Implementation summary with verification steps

active_projects.completion_summary: Replaced WezTerm Leader+c keybinding with custom action_callback that reads the foreground process's actual CWD from /proc/PID/cwd, fixing stale OSC 7 metadata issue after exiting Neovim.

artifacts.summary: Research report comparing ProofChecker and Logos/Theory agent system changes with 5 prioritized feature recommendations
5-phase implementation plan (revised: removed Lean-specific blocked tools documentation)
Implementation summary with verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented context index schema (index.json), agent context discovery via jq queries, model enforcement (opus for research/planning), and context gap detection in research reports. Team Mode (Phase 5) skipped as optional.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Added Context Discovery section to CLAUDE.md, added Model column to Skill-to-Agent Mapping table. Created agent-frontmatter-standard.md. Updated artifact-formats.md and report-format.md with Context Extension Recommendations.

artifacts.summary: Research report on WezTerm-Neovim directory sync: found existing OSC 7 implementation already handles tab titles and spawn directory inheritance
Supplemental research on persisting directory changes in parent shell after Neovim exits, recommending the lastdir file + shell wrapper pattern
Diagnostic investigation identifying Neovim OSC 7 emission as primary cause of WezTerm directory drift, with 5 options for fixing
Analysis of 4 fix options for OSC 7 metadata vs shell $PWD issue; recommends fish prompt hook as minimal fix (4 lines)
1-phase implementation plan: add fish prompt hook to fix stale OSC 7 metadata after Neovim exits
Implementation summary with verification steps and notes

active_projects.completion_summary: Added fish prompt hook (__wezterm_osc7_prompt) that emits OSC 7 escape sequences on every prompt, overwriting stale pane metadata from child processes like Neovim. WezTerm new tabs now spawn at the shell's actual $PWD after Neovim exits.

Revised plan with single-letter keybindings and cross-account compatibility
Implementation summary with verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented Himalaya label management keybindings: toggle read/unread (u), toggle star (*), label picker (l), and folder management (L). Includes cross-account compatibility for Gmail and Protonmail with account-aware label path normalization.

artifacts.summary: Research report on Protonmail folder/label sync with Himalaya including IMAP testing results, architecture comparison with Gmail, and recommended mbsyncrc configuration

Implementation summary with verification results for Protonmail bidirectional sync

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented bidirectional Protonmail label/folder sync by adding logos-labels and logos-folders mbsync channels to home-manager configuration. Tested sync operations and updated himalaya.md documentation.

artifacts.summary: Research report on Gmail-Himalaya folder/label synchronization, covering bidirectional sync behavior, mbsync configuration, and Himalaya folder commands
Revised plan for mbsyncrc bidirectional sync via home-manager (git-based versioning)

active_projects.completion_summary: Modified mbsyncrc configuration in home.nix to use wildcard patterns (Patterns * \![Gmail]* \!INBOX \!Sent \!Drafts \!Trash \!All_Mail \!Spam) with Remove Both directive for bidirectional Gmail folder sync. Excluded dedicated-channel folders to prevent sync conflicts. Updated documentation with sync workflows.

Implementation summary for simplified threading keybindings

active_projects.completion_summary: Simplified himalaya sidebar threading keybindings from 6 keys (Tab, zo, zc, zR, zM, gT) to 2 keys (Tab for single thread, S-Tab for all threads). Added intelligent toggle_all_threads() function that collapses all if any expanded, else expands all.

active_projects.completion_summary: Documented himalaya sent folder config fix, implemented sync_all() function for HimalayaSyncFull command, added 4 sidebar keybindings (s/S/A/i) for sync and account operations, and updated help menu with new Sync & Accounts and Threading sections.
